role: Test suite for the scan policy engine and scanner module.
responsibility: Verifies that the scanner correctly discovers files and respects scan policy settings (exclusions, depth, etc.) loaded from project configuration, ensuring integration between Scanner, Config, and DEFAULT_SCAN_POLICY works as expected.

children.role: Test suite for ArchSpine's scan policy engine — validates that scan behavior respects policy settings (exclusions, depth, etc.) when integrated with Scanner and Config.
Vitest test suite for the Scanner engine, validating file discovery and scan policy behavior in an isolated temporary directory.
